---
title: "ST558 Homework 2"
format: html
editor: source
---

# Task 1

```{r}
pre_trtmt <- c(130, 128, 116, 124, 133, 134, 118, 126, 114, 127, 141, 138, 128, 140, 137, 131, 120, 128, 139, 135)
post_trtmt <- c(114, 98, 113, 99, 107, 116, 113, 111, 119, 117, 101, 119, 130, 122, 106, 106, 124, 102, 117, 113)

names(pre_trtmt) <- paste("Subject", 1:20, sep = "_")
names(post_trtmt) <- paste("Subject", 1:20, sep = "_")
```
